SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client

Interface RMIClientSkeleton

All Superinterfaces:
ClientInterface, Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClientRMI
public interface RMIClientSkeleton extends Remote, ClientInterface
the RMIClientSkeleton is the remote client seen by the server, that exposes the methods called by the server.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    errorMessage(String description)
    the error message method sends the error message given in the description.
    void
    notifyPlayer(String message)
    the notifyPlayer method sends to the player confirmations about the previews action of the player, for example if the player has drawn a card, if he has placed a card, if he has chosen the objectives, if he has chosen his token or if it's his turn.
    void
    ping()
    the ping method is used to check if the connection is still active.
    void
    playerAdded(String player)
    the playerAdded method adds a player to the lobby and notifies the other player about it.
    void
    playerDisconnection()
    the playerDisconnection method notifies the disconnection of a player
    void
    receiveLobbies(ArrayList<Integer> Lobbies)
    the receiveLobbies method sets the list of available lobbies and change the state of the view to "choose_lobby".
    void
    sendNowUnavailableToken(String player, Token token)
    the nowUnavailableToken method set to the player the token he chose, removing it from the list of the available ones to choose from.
    void
    sendPlayersInOrder(List<String> playersInOrder)
    the sendPlayersInOrder method sends a randomly generated list of the players, ordered according to their turns in the game.
    void
    showResults(Map<String,Integer> PlayerPoints, Map<String,Integer> PlayerNumCompletedObjectives)
    the sendResults method sends the final points of each player.
    void
    updateAvailable(String deck, Resource topOfDeck, String availableChanged, List<Integer> available)
    the updatesAvailable method sends to the player the new available cards on the field.
    void
    updateDeckView(String deck, Resource resource)
    the updatesDeckView sends to the player the top of the resource or gold deck, based on which one is requested.
    void
    updateHandAndDeckView(String deck, Resource resource, int cardId)
    the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method updates the player's hand and the new top of the deck right after the player has drawn a card from the deck.
    void
    updateInitialPhase(List<Integer> availableGold, List<Integer> availableResource, int startCard, List<Integer> hand, List<Integer> publicObjectives, List<Integer> privateObjectives, Resource goldDeckBack, Resource resourceDeckBack)
    the sendInitial method sends to the player the starting setup of the game, including the available gold and resource cards on the field, the top of the decks, his hand, his starting card, the public and private objectives.
    void
    updateKingdom(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
    the updatesPlayersKingdomView method places a card and update the View of the player right after placing it, either if it's a starting card or another card.
    void
    updateLobbyView(String yourNickname, List<String> playerNickname, int lobbyNum, int totalPlayers)
    the updateLobbyView method sends to the player all the infos about the lobby, for example the nicknames of the players in the lobby, the number of players in the lobby or the maximum capacity of the lobby.

  • Method Details

    • updateLobbyView

      void updateLobbyView(String yourNickname, List<String> playerNickname, int lobbyNum, int totalPlayers) throws RemoteException
      the updateLobbyView method sends to the player all the infos about the lobby, for example the nicknames of the players in the lobby, the number of players in the lobby or the maximum capacity of the lobby.
      Parameters:
      yourNickname - is the player receiving the message.
      playerNickname - is the list of players in the lobby.
      lobbyNum - is the number of players in the lobby.
      totalPlayers - is the maximum number of players the lobby can contain.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • receiveLobbies

      void receiveLobbies(ArrayList<Integer> Lobbies) throws RemoteException
      the receiveLobbies method sets the list of available lobbies and change the state of the view to "choose_lobby".
      Parameters:
      Lobbies - is the list of Lobbies.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • playerAdded

      void playerAdded(String player) throws RemoteException
      the playerAdded method adds a player to the lobby and notifies the other player about it.
      Parameters:
      player - is the player added.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateInitialPhase

      void updateInitialPhase(List<Integer> availableGold, List<Integer> availableResource, int startCard, List<Integer> hand, List<Integer> publicObjectives, List<Integer> privateObjectives, Resource goldDeckBack, Resource resourceDeckBack) throws RemoteException
      the sendInitial method sends to the player the starting setup of the game, including the available gold and resource cards on the field, the top of the decks, his hand, his starting card, the public and private objectives.
      Parameters:
      availableGold - is the list of available gold cards the player can draw.
      availableResource - is the list of available resource cards the player can draw.
      startCard - is the player's starting card.
      hand - is the player's hand.
      publicObjectives - is the public objectives the player has to complete.
      privateObjectives - is the private objectives the player has to choose from.
      goldDeckBack - is the top of the gold deck from which the player can draw.
      resourceDeckBack - is the top of the gold deck from which the player can draw.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • sendNowUnavailableToken

      void sendNowUnavailableToken(String player, Token token) throws RemoteException
      the nowUnavailableToken method set to the player the token he chose, removing it from the list of the available ones to choose from.
      Parameters:
      player - is the player choosing the token.
      token - is the token chosen.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • sendPlayersInOrder

      void sendPlayersInOrder(List<String> playersInOrder) throws RemoteException
      the sendPlayersInOrder method sends a randomly generated list of the players, ordered according to their turns in the game.
      Parameters:
      playersInOrder - is the ordered list of the players.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • notifyPlayer

      void notifyPlayer(String message) throws RemoteException
      the notifyPlayer method sends to the player confirmations about the previews action of the player, for example if the player has drawn a card, if he has placed a card, if he has chosen the objectives, if he has chosen his token or if it's his turn.
      Parameters:
      message - is the message notified to the player.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateKingdom

      void updateKingdom(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos) throws RemoteException
      the updatesPlayersKingdomView method places a card and update the View of the player right after placing it, either if it's a starting card or another card.
      Parameters:
      player - is the player who places the card.
      cardId - is the cardId of the card to be placed.
      side - is the side of the card to be placed.
      pos - is the position where the player wants to place the card.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateHandAndDeckView

      void updateHandAndDeckView(String deck, Resource resource, int cardId) throws RemoteException
      the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method updates the player's hand and the new top of the deck right after the player has drawn a card from the deck.
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      resource - is the new top of the deck requested.
      cardId - is the card the player has drawn and that now is in his hand.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateDeckView

      void updateDeckView(String deck, Resource resource) throws RemoteException
      the updatesDeckView sends to the player the top of the resource or gold deck, based on which one is requested.
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      resource - is the top of the deck requested.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateAvailable

      void updateAvailable(String deck, Resource topOfDeck, String availableChanged, List<Integer> available) throws RemoteException
      the updatesAvailable method sends to the player the new available cards on the field.
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      topOfDeck - is the resource of the new top of the deck requested.
      availableChanged - is the new available card that has changed.
      available - is the new list of the available cards on the field.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • showResults

      void showResults(Map<String,Integer> PlayerPoints, Map<String,Integer> PlayerNumCompletedObjectives) throws RemoteException
      the sendResults method sends the final points of each player.
      Parameters:
      PlayerPoints - is a map of each player's points.
      PlayerNumCompletedObjectives - is a map of the number of objectives completed by each player.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • errorMessage

      void errorMessage(String description) throws RemoteException
      the error message method sends the error message given in the description.
      Parameters:
      description - is the message sent.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • playerDisconnection

      void playerDisconnection() throws RemoteException
      the playerDisconnection method notifies the disconnection of a player
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • ping

      void ping() throws RemoteException
      the ping method is used to check if the connection is still active.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.
